prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous coordinator in a formal cloak, steadies a large metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Brightford, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, uses a safe, blunt repair tool to smooth the shield's edge. Cooperative hands, soft warm forge lighting, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent character appearance and lighting. Yuna Brightford carefully taps the final repair mark on the shield while Yuna Silverbrook maintains a steady, firm grip on the frame. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.
